articles.title_en: Driver Killed in Moscow Region Car Explosion Near Site of General’s Assassination
articles.lead_en: The bombing follows a string of assassination plots inside Russia targeting military officials, pro-war figures and Ukrainian defectors since the 2022 invasion of Ukraine.

articles.title_en: Russia and Malaysia will hold emergency response exercises in Kazan
articles.lead_en: They will be held on the basis of a new training ground for firefighters and rescuers
articles.title_raw: Россия и Малайзия проведут в Казани учения по ликвидации ЧС
articles.lead_raw: Они будут проводиться на базе нового учебно-тренировочного полигона пожарных и спасателей
